title: Red Dead Redemption in MC
description: Makes minecraft go back to the wild west in the same era of red dead redemption 2.
body:
Step into the rugged frontier of the Wild West with this immersive modpack inspired by Red Dead Redemption 2. Explore vast landscapes, ride horses, hunt wildlife, and survive the harsh frontier—all in Minecraft!

🔫 Key Features
	•	Realistic Gunplay – Shoot, reload, and duel with a variety of iconic firearms.
	•	Wildlife & Hunting – Hunt buffalo, deer, and more, while observing realistic animal behavior.
	•	Horseback Riding – Tame, ride, and care for horses across expansive terrains.
	•	Survival Elements – Manage health, thirst, and stamina to survive the wilderness.


    Map made by LMTGaming on Planet Minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/red-dead-redemtion-world-in-minecraft
